domain: renewable energy, solar mounting, wind measurement, battery storage, and electrical infrastructure hardware

ideas.product_context: Rooftop photovoltaic panel mounting systems using aluminum rails and framed solar modules.
ideas.core_function: Clamp adjacent solar panel frames to a mounting rail while allowing small frame-height variations.
ideas.likely_main_part: CNC-machined aluminum mid-clamp block with stepped contact faces, bolt clearance slot, and serrated underside.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires asymmetric steps, functional serrations, bolt-slot geometry, frame-contact surfaces, and clear distinction between clamping faces and clearance regions.

ideas.product_context: Meteorological towers used for wind-resource assessment before turbine installation.
ideas.core_function: Hold a horizontal sensor boom at a fixed offset from a round mast while resisting rotation under wind loading.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined split clamp bracket with semicircular mast bore, boom socket, cross-bolt holes, and anti-rotation ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines cylindrical clamping geometry, perpendicular socket features, split-line details, ribbing, and multiple fastener axes.

ideas.product_context: Grid-scale lithium battery storage cabinets mounted in seismic-rated equipment rooms.
ideas.core_function: Anchor a battery rack frame to concrete while distributing load and allowing minor alignment adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Thick steel base foot plate with slotted anchor holes, raised rack pad, gusset interfaces, and chamfered corners.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests plate thickness, slots, raised bosses, load-bearing pads, chamfers, and orientation-specific mounting surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Single-axis solar tracker systems supporting long rows of photovoltaic modules.
ideas.core_function: Cradle and locate a rectangular or round torque tube on a rotating support post.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined saddle block with concave tube seat, side keeper flanges, bolt holes, and drain relief channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires curved seating surfaces, flange constraints, drainage cutouts, bolt patterns, and structural mass distribution.

ideas.product_context: Outdoor electrical infrastructure carrying power cables across temperature-varying solar or battery sites.
ideas.core_function: Allow controlled longitudinal expansion between cable tray sections while maintaining lateral alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined sliding splice plate with elongated guide slots, stop shoulders, low-friction bearing lands, and fastener bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests sliding interfaces, long slots, travel stops, paired symmetry, and surfaces that must remain parallel and coplanar.

ideas.product_context: Mechanical wind direction sensors mounted on remote weather stations.
ideas.core_function: Connect a lightweight vane tail to a vertical sensor shaft with precise angular alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Small machined hub with vertical shaft bore, radial vane slot, set-screw holes, and alignment datum notch.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Uses intersecting bores, thin slots, set-screw geometry, datum features, and rotational alignment details.

ideas.product_context: Utility-scale ground-mounted solar arrays installed on driven steel piles.
ideas.core_function: Provide a bolted interface between a vertical pile and an angled racking support member.
ideas.likely_main_part: Weldment-derived machined cap plate with pile saddle radius, angled mounting face, bolt pattern, and stiffening webs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests angled planes, curved saddle contact, bolt-hole arrays, web-like reinforcement, and non-orthogonal part relationships.

ideas.product_context: Battery storage packs where prismatic cells are mechanically compressed inside a module frame.
ideas.core_function: Apply even compression across a cell stack while tying into side rails and tie rods.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined aluminum end plate with tie-rod holes, recessed cell contact field, perimeter rail pockets, and edge stiffeners.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires large flat datum surfaces, recessed fields, repeated hole patterns, rail pockets, and stiffness-driven geometry.

ideas.product_context: Electrical substations using rigid aluminum or copper busbars supported on insulators.
ideas.core_function: Mechanically retain a rectangular busbar while allowing thermal movement and maintaining clearance.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined clamp saddle with rectangular busbar channel, insulated spacer pocket, cap-screw holes, and rounded corona-safe edges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests rectangular channels, clearance gaps, spacer pockets, rounded edge requirements, and functional electrical-mechanical constraints.

ideas.product_context: Mechanical skids carrying solar inverters, transformers, or battery power conversion equipment.
ideas.core_function: Provide a certified lifting point for moving a heavy electrical skid during installation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Thick machined lifting lug with large shackle hole, base bolt pattern, load-spreading fillets, and orientation marking recess.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires high-load geometry, large through-hole features, generous fillets, base interface definition, and clear force-path representation.
